name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Doraville, GA TitleMax Title Pawns at 5679 Buford Hwy NE offers quick title loans and collateral-based pawns with same-day funding.
description_long:
Located at 5679 Buford Hwy NE in Doraville, GA, TitleMax Title Pawns is a standalone storefront offering quick access to title loans and collateral-based pawns. The Doraville location operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, making it convenient for working professionals in the area.

At this Doraville branch, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral, with potential same-day funding. The knowledgeable team at 770-451-2390 can walk you through the application process and explain your options for quick cash solutions.

If you're a Doraville resident facing unexpected expenses, this TitleMax Title Pawns location provides a fast alternative to traditional lenders. Bring your vehicle's title, a valid ID, and proof of income to explore your funding options quickly.
pros: Accepts most credit types including bad credit after a credit check
Online application with remote vehicle photo appraisal — store visit only for signing
Customers keep driving their vehicle throughout the pawn period
Over 20 years serving the Atlanta market at this specific location
5.0/5 average rating across 465+ Google reviews with named staff cited for quality service
Extended weekday hours (10am–7pm Mon–Fri) with Saturday availability
cons: APR rates are not disclosed on the store page; Georgia title pawns can carry triple-digit APRs
Vehicle title is held as collateral and can be surrendered if the pawn is not repaid
Active-duty military members, their spouses, and dependents are ineligible
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access for emergency weekend needs
Location is not bilingual, which may be a barrier for non-English speakers
best_for: Borrowers with poor or limited credit who own a lien-free vehicle outright
Consumers who need same-day cash and have exhausted lower-cost options
Atlanta-area residents in the Candler Road, Decatur, or East Atlanta neighborhoods
Individuals who need cash but cannot qualify for a personal loan or payday alternative
diagnosis: TitleMax Title Pawns on Candler Road is a viable emergency cash source for Atlanta residents who own their vehicle outright and have poor credit with no lower-cost alternatives available. The main caveat is cost: title pawns in Georgia carry some of the highest effective APRs in consumer finance, and non-repayment risks permanent loss of the borrower's vehicle.
services: Title pawn (in-store) using vehicle title as collateral
Online title pawn application with remote vehicle photo appraisal
Same-day cash disbursement upon pawn approval
Vehicle appraisal based on make, model, and condition
Credit check with broad credit type acceptance
Document signing and fund collection at store
Instant online eligibility estimate before store visit
Title retention by lender during pawn term with customer retaining vehicle use
meta_description: Doraville, GA TitleMax Title Pawns at 5679 Buford Hwy NE. Get quick title loans and same-day funding.
